name: Minced Squab B1
recipeIngredient: 2 Squabs, skinned, boned and finely chopped
8 Fresh chinese mushrooms, washed, soaked, and chopped fine
8 Water chestnuts, skinned, washed, chopped fine.
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the wok and add the peanut oil. When the oil is very hot, add the squab, garlic, and ginger. Stir-fry for 2 minutes.
2. Add the mushrooms, water chestnuts, bamboo shoots, and Virginia ham. Stir-fry for 1 minute.
3. Add the soy sauce, oyster sauce, sugar, salt, sesame oil, and chicken stock. Stir-fry for another minute.
4. Add the scallions and cornstarch mixture. Mix thoroughly.
5. To serve, spoon 2 tablespoons of the minced squab onto one lettuce leaf. Top with 1 teaspoon Hoisin sauce, roll up like a tortilla, and eat with your fingers.
